identity.name: JoyTracker
design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix wellness calm with fintech precision
Emotion First: Color gradients represent emotional states
Content is King: Data visualization (speedometer) is the hero
Negative Space: Breathable layouts for reflection
Contrast: Neon accents on deep purple backgrounds

theme_strategy.rules: Auth pages use LIGHT theme (white/gray). Main app uses DARK PURPLE theme (#130820).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(139,92,246,0.3)] transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10

inputs.default: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-primary/20 text-white placeholder:text-white/30

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-[#130820]/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-white/10 h-16 flex items-center justify-around z-50 safe-area-pb

gradients.text_gradient: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-400 via-orange-500 to-green-500

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SWITCHING: Implement a context or hook to handle the specific requirement: Auth pages = Light Mode, App pages = Dark Mode. Do not rely on system preference alone.
2. SPEEDOMETER: Create a custom component for the Happiness Speedometer. It must accept a value (0-10) and animate the needle. Use the specified Red-Orange-Green gradient.
3. BOTTOM NAV: Implement a fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile. Ensure it has proper padding for safe areas on iOS.
4. FORMS: Use Shadcn Form + React Hook Form. Customize the Input and Checkbox components to match the Dark Purple theme (remove default white backgrounds).
5. GRADIENTS: Apply the 'Yellow-Orange-Green' gradient to the main page headings as requested.
6. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs) for testing.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry where possible.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Do not use 'Inter' for headings; use 'Outfit'.
Ensure text contrast meets APCA standards, especially on dark backgrounds.
